name: Redbridge Group / Polling Tools
description: Professional polling and research firms (Redbridge, Essential, Resolve, Newspoll) that provide quantitative and qualitative political research — from electorate-level polls to national tracking surveys and focus groups.
whyUseIt: Data-driven campaigns make better decisions. Polling tells you where you stand, which issues resonate, and how your message is landing. In Australia, firms like Redbridge Group, Essential Research, and Resolve Strategic provide the research that shapes party strategy.
funnelPosition: Top and mid funnel — research that informs strategy
marketerWorkflow: Commission baseline poll of your electorate, identify key issues and voter segments, test campaign messages via focus groups, track movement with follow-up polls
managerExpects: Quarterly polling showing primary vote, two-party preferred, issue salience, and leader approval in target electorates
demoDescription: Review a sample polling report showing primary vote, two-party preferred, and issue importance rankings for a marginal electorate, then discuss how to adjust campaign strategy based on the data

vocabulary.definition: The estimated vote split between the two leading candidates after preferences are distributed
The range within which the true result likely falls — typically +/- 3% for a sample of 1,000

beginnerMistakes: Over-interpreting a single poll — look at trends, not individual data points
Confusing primary vote with two-party preferred
